title: Forest X Reborn
description: The revival of the legendary Forest X Second Edition addon, but only for Minecraft Java Edition.
body:
## THIS PROJECT IS DEPRECATED!
Forest X Reborn is a mod for Minecraft that aims to update the nature and mechanics of the game. It adds new biomes, trees and plants to the game that look more realistic and detailed.
One of the main innovations of the mod is the addition of new types of trees. Now players will be able to see not only the usual oaks and firs, but also exotic tree species such as mulberry, eucalyptus and palm trees. In addition, the mod adds new types of mushrooms and berries that can be collected and used for cooking.
Also, Forest X Reborn adds new mechanisms that allow players to create more complex and interesting buildings. For example, the mod adds a fermentation barrel that allows you to create wine from grapes. 
In addition, the mod also adds new sounds and music that create a more atmospheric gaming environment.
Overall, Forest X Reborn is a great addition for Minecraft lovers who want to enjoy a more realistic and interesting game.
